title: Go Coding Skill Config
description: Configuration for the go-coding workflow skill.

mode.description: Operation mode: implement a feature, refactor existing code, or fix a bug.

run_tests.description: When true, run go test and golangci-lint during evaluation.

depth.description: Context scan depth: fast (go.mod only), normal (go.mod + indexes + conventions), deep (all plus full dependency graph).

max_files.description: Maximum number of files to modify in a single implementation pass.
